name: skyscheduler
description: Bluesky Post/Repost Scheduler on Cloudflare workers

scripts.build: npm run static-pages && npm run minify
scripts.auth: npx auth@latest generate --config auth.config.ts --output src/db/auth.schema.ts -y && npx prettier --write src/db/auth.schema.ts
scripts.migrate:all: npm run migrate:local && npm run migrate:prod
scripts.minify:css:base: minify assets/css/stylesheet.css > assets/css/stylesheet.min.css && minify assets/css/dashboard.css > assets/css/dashboard.min.css

scriptsComments.dev: run this application in development locally
scriptsComments.dev:queue: runs the application in development but with queue support
scriptsComments.deploy: uploads the local version directly to your worker
scriptsComments.auth: builds the better auth db tables, should only ever be used once
scriptsComments.generate: generates any db schema changes and their migration sql commands
scriptsComments.optimize: runs database optimizations for both local and production dbs
scriptsComments.migrate: syncs the current migration steps directly into the given db, then optimizes it
scriptsComments.migrate:prod: runs the above but only for production
scriptsComments.migrate:local: runs migrate but only for local
scriptsComments.minify: runs minification/bundling on client scripts, done every build
scriptsComments.invite:local <code> <usage #>: commits an invite code directly to the local invite key store
